expression.content: [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]-[Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost]
[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]  -  [Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost]
( [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]  -  [Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost]) / [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]

iif(iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number < 1,true,false) , null , 
   iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 1,
   [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount],Sum(PERIODSTODATE([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],
      [Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember),[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount])))

iif(iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number < 1,true,false) , null , 
   iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 1,
   [Measures].[Internet Sales Amount],Sum(PERIODSTODATE([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],
      [Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember),[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount])))

iif(iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number < 2,true,false) , null , 
iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 2,[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount],
Sum(PERIODSTODATE([Order Date].[Order Date].[Month],
      [Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember),[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount])))

iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 1,
[Measures].[YTD],
iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 2,
[Measures].[MTD],
[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]))
([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] ,ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],1,[Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember ))

iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 1,
[Measures].[YTD],
iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 2,
[Measures].[MTD],
[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]))
[Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost]

iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 1,
[Measures].[YTD],
iif([Order Date].[Order Date].Currentmember.level_number = 2,
[Measures].[MTD],
[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]))
[Measures].[Internet Total Product Cost]
[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]/[Measures].[Customer Count]

([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] - ([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] ,ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],1,[Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember )))/[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]
([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]/([Measures].[Internet Sales Amount] ,ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],1,[Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember)))-1

([Measures].[Internet Order Count] - ([Measures].[Internet Order Count] ,ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],1,[Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember )))/[Measures].[Internet Order Count]

([Measures].[Internet Gross Profit] - ([Measures].[Internet Gross Profit] ,ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],1,[Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember )))/[Measures].[Internet Gross Profit]
([Measures].[Customer Count] - ([Measures].[Customer Count] ,ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],1,[Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember )))/[Measures].[Customer Count]
([Measures].[Amount] - ([Measures].[Amount] ,ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[Order Date].[Year],1,[Order Date].[Order Date].CurrentMember )))/[Measures].[Amount]
iif([Measures].[Difference Internet Sales Amount %] > 0, true, "")
iif([Measures].[Difference Internet Order Count %] > 0, true, "")
iif([Measures].[Difference Internet Gross Margin %] > 0, true, "")
iif([Measures].[Difference Internet Gross Margin %] > 0, true, "")

calcMembers.expression:
//Multiple dimension eg Account (Cash in Hand) and Order Date
([Account].[Account Hierarchy].&[4],[Order Date].[Order Date].[Year].&[2013])
calcMembers.name: Cash In Hand FY 2013

calcMembers.expression:
//Case statement example Organization memner 14 is USA Operations and 8 is Canadian Division
Case [Organisation].[H_Organisation].currentmember when [Organisation].[H_Organisation].&[14] then 10000000
when
[Organisation].[H_Organisation].&[8] then 1000000
else 1000 end
calcMembers.name: Investment

calcMembers.expression:
// Corporate excluding R&D and Quality Assurance 
([Department].[Department].&[1]-([Department].[Department].&[6]+[Department].[Department].&[5]))
calcMembers.name: Corporate less RnD and QnA

calcMembers.expression:
//Cash growth from previous year
(([Order Date].[H_Fiscal].CurrentMember, [Account].[Account Hierarchy].&[4]) - (ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[H_Fiscal].[Fiscal Year], 1, [Order Date].[H_Fiscal].CurrentMember),[Account].[Account Hierarchy].&[4]))
calcMembers.name: Cash Growth

calcMembers.expression:
//Gross Sales growth from previous year
(([Order Date].[H_Fiscal].CurrentMember, [Account].[Account Hierarchy].&[51]) - (ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[H_Fiscal].[Fiscal Year], 1, [Order Date].[H_Fiscal].CurrentMember),[Account].[Account Hierarchy].&[51]))
calcMembers.name: Sales Growth

calcMembers.expression:
//Cash growth Pct from previous year
(([Order Date].[H_Fiscal].CurrentMember, [Account].[Account Hierarchy].&[4]) - (ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[H_Fiscal].[Fiscal Year], 1, [Order Date].[H_Fiscal].CurrentMember),[Account].[Account Hierarchy].&[4]))/([Order Date].[H_Fiscal].CurrentMember, [Account].[Account Hierarchy].&[4])
calcMembers.name: Cash Growth%

calcMembers.expression:
//Gross Sales growth Pct from previous year
(([Order Date].[H_Fiscal].CurrentMember, [Account].[Account Hierarchy].&[51]) - (ParallelPeriod([Order Date].[H_Fiscal].[Fiscal Year], 1, [Order Date].[H_Fiscal].CurrentMember),[Account].[Account Hierarchy].&[51]))/([Order Date].[H_Fiscal].CurrentMember, [Account].[Account Hierarchy].&[51])
calcMembers.name: Sales Growt%
